problem: 2012 年“国际攀岩比赛”在重庆举行. 小丽从家出发开车前去观看, 途中发现忘了带门票, 于是打 电话让妈妈马上从家里送来, 同时小丽也往回开, 遇到妈妈后聊了一会儿, 接着继续开车前往比赛现场. 设小丽从 家出发后所用时间为 $\mathrm{t}$, 小丽与比赛现场的距离为 $\mathrm{S}$. 下面能反映 $\mathrm{S}$ 与 $\mathrm{t}$ 的函数关系的大致图象是( )

After meeting her mom, they chatted for a while, and then Xiaoli continued driving toward the competition venue. Let \( t \) represent the time elapsed since Xiaoli left home, and let \( S \) represent the distance between Xiaoli and the competition venue. Which of the following graphs best represents the functional relationship between \( S \) and \( t \)?

problem: 如图,$\triangleABC$中,$AB=BC=\tan\angleB=\frac{4}{3}$,点$D$是边$BC$上的一个动点(点$D$与点$B$不重合),过点$D$作$DE\perp$$AB$,垂足为$E$,点$F$是$AD$的中点,连接$EF$,设$\triangleAEF$的面积为$y$,点$D$从点$B$沿$BC$运动到点$C$的过程中,$D$与$B$的距离为$x$,则能表示$y$与$x$的函数关系的图象大致是( )
label: Analytic Geometry
problem_en: As shown in the figure, in triangle $\triangle ABC$, $AB = BC = \tan\angle B = \frac{4}{3}$. Point $D$ is a moving point on side $BC$ (with $D$ not coinciding with $B$). A perpendicular line $DE$ is drawn from $D$ to $AB$, with $E$ as the foot of the perpendicular. Point $F$ is the midpoint of $AD$, and $EF$ is connected. Let $y$ denote the area of $\triangle AEF$. As point $D$ moves from $B$ along $BC$ to $C$, the distance between $D$ and $B$ is denoted by $x$. Which of the following graphs best represents the functional relationship between $y$ and $x$?

problem: 如图, 边长为 4 个单位长度的正方形 $A B C D$ 的边 $A B$ 与等腰直角三角形 $E F G$ 的斜边 $F G$ 重合, $\triangle E F G$ 以每秒 1 个单位长度 的速度沿 $B C$ 向右匀速运动(保持 $F G \perp B C$ ), 当点 $E$ 运动到 $C D$ 边上时 $\triangle E F G$ 停止运动, 设 $\triangle E F G$ 的运动时间为 $t$ 秒, $\triangle E F G$ 与正方 形 $A B C D$ 重叠部分的面积为 $S$, 则 $S$ 关于 $\mathrm{t}$ 的函数大致图象为( )
label: Metric Geometry
problem_en: As shown in the figure, one side of square \(ABCD\) with a side length of 4 units coincides with the hypotenuse \(FG\) of isosceles right triangle \(EFG\). Triangle \(EFG\) moves uniformly to the right along \(BC\) at a speed of 1 unit per second (maintaining \(FG \perp BC\)). When point \(E\) reaches side \(CD\), triangle \(EFG\) stops moving. Let \(t\) be the time in seconds that triangle \(EFG\) has been moving, and let \(S\) be the area of the overlapping region between triangle \(EFG\) and square \(ABCD\). Then the approximate graph of the function \(S\) in terms of \(t\) is ( ).

problem:
2013 年 “中国好声音” 全国巡演重庆站在奥体中心举行. 童童从家出发前往观看, 先匀 速步行至轻轨车站, 等了一会儿, 童童搭乘轻轨至奥体中心观看演出, 演出结束后, 童童搭 乘邻居刘叔叔的车顺利到家. 其中 $\mathrm{x}$ 表示童童从家出发后所用时间, $\mathrm{y}$ 表示童童离家的距离.
下图能反映 $\mathrm{y}$ 与 $\mathrm{x}$ 的函数关系式的大致图象是( )
label: Descriptive Geometry
problem_en:
In 2013, the Chongqing stop of the nationwide tour for "The Voice of China" was held at the Olympic Sports Center. Tongtong set off from home to attend the show. First, she walked at a constant speed to the light rail station, waited for a while, then took the light rail to the Olympic Sports Center to watch the performance. After the show ended, Tongtong took a ride home with her neighbor, Uncle Liu, and arrived safely. Here, \( x \) represents the time elapsed since Tongtong left home, and \( y \) represents the distance between Tongtong and her home.
Which of the following graphs best reflects the functional relationship between \( y \) and \( x \)?

problem: 关于 $x, y$ 的二元一次方程组 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}x-2 y=k \\ 2 x-3 y=-4 k\end{array}\right.$ 的解满足 $x<y$, 则直线 $y=k x-k-1$ 与双曲线 $y=\frac{\mathrm{k}}{\mathrm{x}}$ 在同一平面直角坐标系中大致图象是 ( )
label: Analytic Geometry

For the system of linear equations in two variables $x$ and $y$: 
\[

x - 2y = k \\
2x - 3y = -4k
\end{cases}
\]
the solution satisfies $x < y$. Then, the approximate graphs of the line $y = kx - k - 1$ and the hyperbola $y = \frac{k}{x}$ in the same Cartesian coordinate system are ( ).

From point $P$, perpendiculars $PM$ and $PN$ are drawn to the $x$-axis and $y$-axis, respectively, with feet at $M$ and $N$. Let $S$ denote the area of quadrilateral $OMPN$, and let $t$ represent the time taken by point $P$ to move. Then the approximate graph of $S$ as a function of $t$ is ( ).

problem:
如图, 已知矩形 $A B C D$ 中, $A B=4 \mathrm{~cm}, B C=8 \mathrm{~cm}$. 动点 $P$ 在边 $B C$ 上从点 $B$ 向 $C$ 运动, 速度为 $1 \mathrm{~cm} / \mathrm{s}$; 同时动点 $Q$ 从点 $C$ 出发, 沿折线 $C \rightarrow D \rightarrow A$ 运动, 速 度为 $2 \mathrm{~cm} / \mathrm{s}$. 当一个点到达终点时, 另一个点随之停止运动. 设点 $P$ 运动的时间为 $t(\mathrm{~s})$,
$\triangle B P Q$ 的面积为 $S\left(\mathrm{~cm}^2\right)$, 则描述 $S\left(\mathrm{~cm}^2\right)$ 与时间 $t(s)$ 的函数关系的图象大致是 ( )
label: Algebra
problem_en:
As shown in the figure, rectangle $ABCD$ has $AB = 4 \, \text{cm}$ and $BC = 8 \, \text{cm}$. Point $P$ moves along side $BC$ from point $B$ to $C$ at a speed of $1 \, \text{cm/s}$; simultaneously, point $Q$ starts from point $C$ and moves along the broken line $C \rightarrow D \rightarrow A$ at a speed of $2 \, \text{cm/s}$. When one point reaches its destination, the other point stops moving as well. Let $t$ (in seconds) be the time during which point $P$ moves,
and let $S$ (in $\text{cm}^2$) be the area of $\triangle BPQ$. Then the graph that roughly describes the functional relationship between $S$ (in $\text{cm}^2$) and time $t$ (in seconds) is ( )

Now, keeping right triangle $\triangle PMN$ stationary, rectangle $ABCD$ moves to the right along the line containing $MN$ at a speed of $1 \, \text{cm per second}. Let $x$ be the number of seconds that have passed, and let $y$ represent the area of the overlapping region between rectangle $ABCD$ and triangle $\triangle PMN$.

When one of the moving points reaches its destination, the other also stops moving. The function graph that roughly represents the area $y (\text{cm}^2)$ of $\triangle CPO$ formed during the motion as a function of the motion time $x (s)$ is ( ).

problem: 如图, 直线 $l$ 的解析式为 $y=-x+4$, 它与 $x$ 轴和 $y$ 轴分别相交于 $A, B$ 两点. 平 行于直线 $l$ 的直线 $m$ 从原点 $O$ 出发, 沿 $x$ 轴的正方向以每秒 1 个单位长度的速度运动. 它 与 $x$ 轴和 $y$ 轴分别相交于 $C, D$ 两点, 运动时间为 $t$ 秒 $(0 \leqslant t \leqslant 4)$, 以 $C D$ 为斜边作等腰 直角三角形 $C D E$ ( $E, O$ 两点分别在 $C D$ 两侧). 若 $\triangle C D E$ 和 $\triangle O A B$ 的重合部分的面积为 $S$, 则 $S$ 与 $t$ 之间的函数关系的图象大致是( )

problem_en: As shown in the figure, the equation of line \( l \) is \( y = -x + 4 \), and it intersects the \( x \)-axis and \( y \)-axis at points \( A \) and \( B \), respectively. Line \( m \), which is parallel to line \( l \), starts from the origin \( O \) and moves along the positive direction of the \( x \)-axis at a speed of 1 unit per second. It intersects the \( x \)-axis and \( y \)-axis at points \( C \) and \( D \), respectively, with the motion lasting \( t \) seconds (\( 0 \leqslant t \leqslant 4 \)). An isosceles right triangle \( CDE \) is constructed with \( CD \) as its hypotenuse, where points \( E \) and \( O \) lie on opposite sides of \( CD \). If the area of the overlapping region between \( \triangle CDE \) and \( \triangle OAB \) is \( S \), then the graph of the functional relationship between \( S \) and \( t \) is approximately ( ).

problem: 为了建设社会主义新农村, 我市积极推进“行政村通畅工程”. 张村和王村 之间的道路需要进行改造, 施工队在工作了一段时间后, 因暴雨被迫停工几天, 不过施工队随后加快了施工进度, 按时完成了两村之间的道路改造. 下面能反映该工程尚未改造的道路 里程 $\mathrm{y}$ (公里) 与时间 $\mathrm{x}$ (天) 的函数关系的大致图象是 ( )

However, the team subsequently accelerated the construction schedule and completed the road renovation between the two villages on time. Which of the following graphs best represents the functional relationship between the remaining unrenovated road distance \( y \) (in kilometers) and time \( x \) (in days)?

problem:
为了节能减排, 鼓励居民节约用电, 某市将出台新的居民用电收费标准:
若每户居民每月用电量不超过 100 度, 则按 50 元/度计算;
若每户居民每月用电量超过 100 度, 则超过部分按 80 元/度计算(未超过部分仍 按每度电 50 元计算).
现假设某户居民某月用电量是 $x$ (单位: 度), 电费为 $y$ (单位: 元), 则 $y$ 与 $x$ 的函数关 系用图象表示正确的是( )
label: Algebra
problem_en:
To promote energy conservation and encourage residents to save electricity, a certain city will introduce new residential electricity pricing standards:
If a household's monthly electricity consumption does not exceed 100 kWh, it will be charged at 50 yuan per kWh;
if a household's monthly electricity consumption exceeds 100 kWh, the excess portion will be charged at 80 yuan per kWh (the portion that does not exceed 100 kWh will still be charged at 50 yuan per kWh).
Now, suppose a household's electricity consumption in a certain month is \( x \) (in kWh), and the electricity bill is \( y \) (in yuan). Which of the following graphs correctly represents the functional relationship between \( y \) and \( x \)?

Let \( x \) be the distance that point \( C \) is translated, and let \( y \) be the sum of the lengths of the segments between \( h \) and \( x \). Then the approximate graph of the function \( y \) with respect to \( x \) is ( ).

problem: 如图, 菱形 $A B C D$ 的边长是 4 厘米, $\angle B=60^{\circ}$, 动点 $P$ 以 1 厘米秒的速度自 $A$ 点出发沿 $A B$ 方向运动至 $B$ 点停止, 动点 $Q$ 以 2 厘米/秒 的速度自 $B$ 点出发沿折线 $B C D$ 运动至 $D$ 点停止. 若点 $P 、 Q$ 同时出发运动了 $t$ 秒, 记 $\triangle B P Q$ 的面积为 $S$ 厘米 ${ }^{2}$, 下面图象中能表示 $S$ 与 $\mathrm{t}$ 之间的函数关系的是( )
label: Metric Geometry
problem_en: As shown in the figure, rhombus $ABCD$ has a side length of 4 cm and $\angle B = 60^\circ$. Point $P$, moving at a speed of 1 cm per second, starts from point $A$ and moves along $AB$ until it stops at point $B$. Point $Q$, moving at a speed of 2 cm per second, starts from point $B$ and moves along the broken line $BCD$ until it stops at point $D$. If points $P$ and $Q$ start moving simultaneously and travel for $t$ seconds, let $S$ be the area of $\triangle BPQ$ in square centimeters. Which of the following graphs correctly represents the functional relationship between $S$ and $t$?

problem: 如图, 矩形 $A B C D$ 中, $A B=8 \mathrm{~cm}$, 点 $P$ 从点 $A$ 出发, 以 $1 \mathrm{~cm} / \mathrm{s}$ 的速度沿 $A \rightarrow D \rightarrow C$ 方向匀速运动, 以 $2 \mathrm{~cm} / \mathrm{s}$ 的速度沿 $A \rightarrow B \rightarrow C$ 方向匀速运动, 当一个点到达点 $C$ 时 $(s), \triangle A P Q$ 的面积为 $S\left(\mathrm{~cm}^{2}\right)$, 下列能大致反映 $S$ 与 $t$ 之间函数关系 的图象是 ( )
label: Analytic Geometry
problem_en: As shown in the figure, in rectangle $ABCD$, $AB = 8 \, \text{cm}$. Point $P$ starts from point $A$ and moves uniformly along the path $A \rightarrow D \rightarrow C$ at a speed of $1 \, \text{cm/s}$, while point $Q$ moves uniformly along the path $A \rightarrow B \rightarrow C$ at a speed of $2 \, \text{cm/s}$. When one of the points reaches point $C$ after $t$ seconds, the area of $\triangle APQ$ is $S \, (\text{cm}^2)$. Which of the following graphs best represents the functional relationship between $S$ and $t$?

problem: 利用如图 1 的二维码可以进行身份识别. 某校建立了一个身份识别系统, 图 2 是某个学生的识别图案, 黑 色小正方形表示 1 , 将第一行数字从左到右依次记为 $a, b, c, d$, 那么可以转换为该生所在班级序号 ${ }^{3}+b \times 2^{2}+c \times 2^{1}+d \times 2^{0}$, 如 图 2 第一行数字从左到右依次为 $1$, 序号为 $0 \times 2^{3}+1 \times 2^{2}+0 \times 2^{1}+1 \times 2^{0}=5$, 表示该生为 5 班学生. 表示 6 班学生的识 别图案是 ( )
label: Counting
problem_en: The QR code shown in Figure 1 can be used for identification purposes. A certain school has established an identification system, and Figure 2 shows the identification pattern for a particular student. Black small squares represent 1. If we denote the digits in the first row from left to right as $a$, $b$, $c$, and $d$, then the corresponding class number can be calculated as ${ }^{3}+b \times 2^{2}+c \times 2^{1}+d \times 2^{0}$. For example, in Figure 2, the digits in the first row from left to right are $1$, resulting in a class number of $0 \times 2^{3}+1 \times 2^{2}+0 \times 2^{1}+1 \times 2^{0}=5$, indicating that the student belongs to Class 5. The identification pattern representing a student from Class 6 is ( ).

problem: 如图, 四边形 $A B C D$ 中, $A B / / D C, D E \perp A B, C F \perp A B$, 垂足 分别为 $E, F$, 且 $A E=E F=F B=5 \mathrm{~cm}, D E=12 \mathrm{~cm}$. 动点 $P, Q$ 均以 $1 \mathrm{~cm} / \mathrm{s}$ 的速度同时 从点 $A$ 出发, 其中点 $P$ 沿折线 $A D-D C-C B$ 运动到点 $B$ 停止, 点 $Q$ 沿 $A B$ 运动到点 $B$ 停止, 设运动时间为 $t(s), \triangle A P Q$ 的面积为 $y\left(\mathrm{~cm}^{2}\right)$, 则 $y$ 与 $t$ 对应关系的图象大致是( )
